title: gentiana verna subsp. delphinensis
intro: Gentiana verna subsp. delphinensis, also known as the Alpine gentian, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Gentiana verna subsp. delphinensis include its potential to improve digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
